title: hieracium hypochoeroides subsp. pinnatiscissum
intro: Hieracium hypochoeroides subsp. pinnatiscissum is a rare subspecies of the Hawkweed plant, characterized by its unique pinnatipartite leaves and yellow flower heads. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it beneficial for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Hieracium hypochoeroides subsp. pinnatiscissum include reducing fever, relieving rheumatic pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used topically to apply its medicinal properties to the skin.
